summary: Comprehensive testing of Birth Plan form functionality. All 9 sections display correctly with status indicators. Modal forms show all question types (text inputs, radio buttons, checkboxes). Save Section button works and updates progress. Form data persists correctly between sessions.
seed_data_creation: Test data created in About Me, Pain Management, and Labor & Delivery sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birth Plan forms fully functional with all 9 sections. Data persistence verified via backend API and frontend UI reload.

birth_plan_main_screen.all_9_sections_displayed: PASS - About Me, Labor & Delivery, Pain Management, Labor Environment, Induction, Pushing, Post-Delivery, Newborn Care, Other Considerations
birth_plan_main_screen.status_indicators: PASS - Shows Complete/Not started with appropriate icons
birth_plan_main_screen.progress_tracker: PASS - Shows X of 9 sections complete with percentage

about_me.text_fields: PASS - Mother's Name, Partner's Name, Email, Phone, Due Date, Doctor/Midwife Name, Hospital Name
about_me.textarea: PASS - Birth Support field with multiline input
about_me.radio_buttons: PASS - Where do you plan to give birth? (Hospital, Birth Center, Home, Not sure)

pain_management.multi_select_checkboxes: PASS - Non-medication methods (11 options), Medication options (6 options)
pain_management.data_persistence: PASS - Previously saved selections displayed correctly

labor_delivery.multi_select_checkboxes: PASS - Environment preferences (8 options), Labor positions (8 options)

newborn_care.radio_buttons: PASS - Baby exam location, First bath, Vernix, Eye prophylaxis, Vitamin K, Hepatitis B, Circumcision, Feeding plan, Pacifier use, Rooming in

post_delivery.radio_buttons: PASS - Skin-to-skin, Cord clamping, Cord cutting, Cord blood banking
post_delivery.multi_select_checkboxes: PASS - Placenta preferences, Golden hour preferences

save_section_button.updates_section_status: PASS - Changed Labor & Delivery from 'Not started' to 'Complete'

data_persistence.frontend_reload: PASS - Reopening modal shows saved selections
data_persistence.backend_api: PASS - GET /api/birth-plan returns saved data with correct structure

backend_api_tests.GET /api/birth-plan: PASS - Returns all 9 sections with status and data
backend_api_tests.PUT /api/birth-plan/section/{section_id}: PASS - Updates section data and status correctly
